# pc-emulation-book custom dictionary

# framework stuff
mdbook
peaceiris

# technical terms
bitfield
bitfields
regs
scancode
scancodes
microcontroller
# IBM specifically spells it this way, one word, no hyphen or em-dash, in the 5150 technical reference.
typematic

# brand names
Centronics

# websites
minuszerodegrees
seasip
csvtable
